title: Siphoneranthemum marmoratum

This classification is based on morphological and molecular characteristics of the plant. The genus Siphoneranthemum is a part of the subfamily Tillandsioideae, a group of epiphytic plants that have adapted to grow in tropical environments. Siphoneranthemum marmoratum specifically falls under the tribe Tillandsieae, which consists of various species of Tillandsia and other related genera. Further research is needed to confirm the exact classification and evolutionary relationships of Siphoneranthemum marmoratum.
